trust.title: Trust, Safety & Security
trust.subtitle: We are committed to honest, secure trading for both buyers and sellers.
trust.buy1: Secure payment: card or bank transfer with clear confirmation.
trust.buy2: Honest listings: we aim for accurate product descriptions and fair pricing.
trust.buy3: Order tracking: follow your order from placement to delivery.
trust.buy4: Support: contact us if something is wrong; we take complaints seriously.
trust.sell1: Secure platform: your listings and sales data are protected.
trust.sell2: Fair dealing: we treat all sellers with respect and transparency.
trust.sell3: Timely payments: clear process for receiving what you earn.
trust.sell4: Support: we help resolve disputes and protect both sides.
trust.commitment: Miaha international market is built on safety, honesty and security. We do not tolerate fraud or misuse. Whether you buy or sell, we want you to feel protected and respected. If you have a concern, contact us.

sell.title: Sell with us
sell.subtitle: Join our marketplace and reach buyers worldwide. We keep it safe and fair for everyone.
sell.step1: Contact us to become a seller. Tell us what you sell and your business details.
sell.step2: We set up your access so you can list your products safely on our platform.
sell.step3: You receive orders; we help keep payments and communication secure.
sell.trustNote: We take safety and honesty seriously. See our Trust & Safety page for how we protect buyers and sellers.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions, concerns or want to become a seller? Get in touch.
contact.note: We aim to reply within 1–2 business days. For order issues, include your order ID.

trackOrder.title: Track your order
trackOrder.enterDetails: Enter your order ID and email to see status and items.

home.title: Buy & sell with confidence
home.subtitle: Discover products you love. Simple checkout. Fast delivery.
home.firstSellersLine: New marketplace — become one of our first sellers.
home.addToCartDesc: Choose what you need and add to cart.
home.checkoutDesc: Enter details and complete your order.

products.noProducts: No products in this category yet. Try another or check back soon.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.name: Name
checkout.useOrderIdAsReference: Use this order ID as the payment reference.
checkout.transferInstructions: Transfer the amount below and use your order ID as the reference.
checkout.cardNotConfigured: Card payments not configured. Order will be created as pending.
checkout.audNote: All prices and payments are in Australian dollars (AUD). Australian cards accepted.
checkout.bankTransferOnly: Pay by bank transfer. You'll receive our bank details after placing your order.
checkout.payWithCardOrBank: Pay with card (amount deducted automatically) or use bank transfer below.
checkout.contactForBankDetails: Contact us for bank transfer details.

jobs.title: Job search
jobs.subtitle: Find opportunities at Miaha international market.
jobs.noJobs: No jobs found. Try a different search or check back later.

footer.copyright: Miaha international market. Buy & sell with confidence.
footer.availableWorldwide: Available worldwide — use your language above.
